description_long: This object consists of two flat, sharply angled, black polygonal shapes positioned symmetrically and separated by a gap, resembling a pair of stylized airplane wings without a visible fuselage, tail, or engines. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with clean, straight edges and a low profile. There are no visible markings, windows, or structural details such as rivets, landing gear, or control surfaces. The overall form is highly abstract, lacking any recognizable cockpit, tail assembly, or propulsion system. The wings appear to be swept back slightly, giving a dynamic, aggressive appearance. The minimalistic design suggests a conceptual or symbolic representation of an airplane rather than a functional vehicle.
description: A pair of sleek, black, angular shapes resembling stylized airplane wings, separated by a gap and lacking fuselage or detail. The design is minimalistic and abstract, with smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Two sharply angled black shapes are seen from above, separated by a wide gap, resembling stylized wings.
description_view_1: One wing-like shape is visible in the upper half, the other in the lower half, both seen edge-on with a strong diagonal separation.
description_view_2: Both angular shapes are visible from a lower angle, appearing as two flat, dark surfaces facing upward and separated by a gap.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, the two shapes are seen edge-on, with one in the upper and one in the lower half, separated by a diagonal gap.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and no visible dihedral or winglets.
